title: Villager Fletcher House
description: Adds a villager fletcher house to the plains biome
body:
### Villager Fletcher House

**This mod adds a Villager Fletcher House to the game, featuring Fletcher villagers who live and work inside the new structure.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d183e01b4b64f10b7ee72f7c30230d40ee60039a.jpeg)


You’ll find archery-themed loot throughout the house, and there’s even a shooting range outside for target practice.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad28d8ba41713e4aaf1efa30657b1e1aeaca5514.jpeg)

The Villager Fletcher House can spawn in the Plains and Sunflower Plains biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
